message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Ship Captain" as captain
participant ":System" as system

activate captain
activate system

captain -> system: 1 wants to check the audit trail of a given container of a given cargo manifest
system --> captain: 2 asks for data(cargo manifest id, container id)
captain -> system: 3 inserts needed data
system --> captain: 4 returns the audit trail in chronological order

deactivate captain
deactivate system
@enduml
